actions.script: var nativeSetter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;function setReactInput(el,val){nativeSetter.call(el,val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}async function typeInInput(el,text){el.focus();setReactInput(el,'');await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,300)});for(var c=0;c<text.length;c++){nativeSetter.call(el,text.substring(0,c+1));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,50+Math.random()*80)});}el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}function hasTurnstileIframe(){var iframes=document.querySelectorAll('iframe');for(var i=0;i<iframes.length;i++){if(iframes[i].src&&iframes[i].src.indexOf('challenges.cloudflare.com')!==-1)return true;}return false;}async function requestTurnstileFocus(){return new Promise(function(resolve){console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Requesting Turnstile focus from extension...');var timeout=setTimeout(function(){window.removeEventListener('message',handler);resolve({success:false,reason:'timeout'});},60000);function handler(event){if(event.source===window&&event.data&&event.data.type==='TURNSTILE_FOCUS_RESPONSE'){clearTimeout(timeout);window.removeEventListener('message',handler);console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Turnstile focus response:',event.data);resolve(event.data);}}window.addEventListener('message',handler);window.postMessage({type:'TURNSTILE_FOCUS_REQUEST'},'*');});}async function waitForTableRows(modal,maxWait){var startTime=Date.now();while(Date.now()-startTime<maxWait){var table=modal.querySelector('table');if(table){var rows=table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr');if(rows.length>0){console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Table loaded with '+rows.length+' rows');return true;}}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Table wait timeout after '+maxWait+'ms');return false;}async function waitForModalWithFocusQueue(maxRetries,contentCheck){for(var attempt=0;attempt<maxRetries;attempt++){var modal=null;var startTime=Date.now();var turnstileCheckDelay=2000;var focusRequested=false;var modalTimeout=60000;await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,turnstileCheckDelay);});if(hasTurnstileIframe()&&!focusRequested){console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Turnstile detected, requesting focus queue...');focusRequested=true;var focusResult=await requestTurnstileFocus();console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Focus queue result:',focusResult);if(focusResult.reason==='modal_appeared'||focusResult.reason==='solved'||focusResult.reason==='no_turnstile'){modal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(modal&&modal.textContent.indexOf(contentCheck)!==-1){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}}}while(Date.now()-startTime<modalTimeout){modal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(modal&&modal.textContent.indexOf(contentCheck)!==-1){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}if(hasTurnstileIframe()&&!focusRequested&&Date.now()-startTime>5000){console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Late Turnstile detected, requesting focus queue...');focusRequested=true;var focusResult=await requestTurnstileFocus();console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Focus queue result:',focusResult);}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}if(modal&&modal.textContent.indexOf(contentCheck)!==-1){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}if(attempt<maxRetries-1){console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Modal timeout, refreshing page (attempt '+(attempt+1)+'/'+maxRetries+')');window.location.reload();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,5000);});var inputReady=false;var inputWaitStart=Date.now();while(Date.now()-inputWaitStart<15000){var inp=document.querySelector("input[type='text']")||document.querySelector("input[name='input']")||document.querySelector("input[placeholder]");if(inp){inputReady=true;break;}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}if(!inputReady){return{success:false,error:'input not found after refresh',attempts:attempt+1};}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000);});}}return{success:false,error:'modal timeout after '+maxRetries+' attempts',attempts:maxRetries};}function findMetricValue(modal,labelText){var allEls=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('*'));for(var i=0;i<allEls.length;i++){var el=allEls[i];if(el.children.length===0&&el.textContent.trim()===labelText){var container=el.parentElement;for(var t=0;t<8;t++){if(!container||container===document.body)break;var candidates=[].slice.call(container.querySelectorAll('span,p')).filter(function(e){var txt=e.textContent.trim();if(txt===labelText)return false;if(e.children.length>1)return false;return /^[\d.,]+[KMB]?$/i.test(txt);});if(candidates.length>0){return candidates[0].textContent.trim();}container=container.parentElement;}}}return null;}function extractBacklinksTable(modal){var table=modal.querySelector('table');if(!table){console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] No table found in modal');return[];}var rows=[].slice.call(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr'));console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Found '+rows.length+' rows in table');return rows.map(function(tr){var tds=[].slice.call(tr.querySelectorAll('td'));if(tds.length<3)return null;var drText=tds[0].textContent.trim();var dr=parseInt(drText,10)||0;var referringPageLinks=[].slice.call(tds[1].querySelectorAll('a'));var referringPageTitle=referringPageLinks.length>0?referringPageLinks[0].textContent.trim():null;var referringPageUrl=referringPageLinks.length>0?referringPageLinks[0].href:null;if(referringPageLinks.length>1){referringPageUrl=referringPageLinks[1].href||referringPageLinks[0].href;}var anchorCell=tds[2];var anchorLinks=[].slice.call(anchorCell.querySelectorAll('a'));var anchorText=null;var targetUrl=null;if(anchorLinks.length>0){anchorText=anchorLinks[0].textContent.trim();targetUrl=anchorLinks[0].href;}if(anchorLinks.length>1){var lastLink=anchorLinks[anchorLinks.length-1];if(lastLink.href&&lastLink.href.indexOf('http')===0){targetUrl=lastLink.href;}}return{domain_rating:dr,referring_page_title:referringPageTitle,referring_page_url:referringPageUrl,anchor_text:anchorText,target_url:targetUrl};}).filter(function(r){return r!==null;});}var domainList='${domains}'.split(',').map(function(d){return d.trim()}).filter(function(d){return d.length>0});var allResults=[];for(var i=0;i<domainList.length;i++){var currentDomain=domainList[i];console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Processing domain: '+currentDomain);var input=document.querySelector("input[type='text']")||document.querySelector("input[name='input']")||document.querySelector("input[placeholder]");if(!input){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,error:'input not found'});continue;}await typeInInput(input,currentDomain);await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500)});var submitBtn=document.querySelector("button[type='submit']");if(!submitBtn){var allBtns=[].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('button'));submitBtn=allBtns.find(function(b){return b.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().indexOf('check backlink')!==-1;});}if(submitBtn){submitBtn.focus();submitBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window}));submitBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window}));submitBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window}));submitBtn.click();}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500)});var form=input.closest('form');if(form){form.dispatchEvent(new Event('submit',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true}));}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,300)});input.focus();input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keypress',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));var waitResult=await waitForModalWithFocusQueue(3,'Backlinks');if(!waitResult.success){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,error:waitResult.error,turnstile_retries:waitResult.attempts});continue;}var modal=waitResult.modal;console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Modal appeared, waiting for table to load...');await waitForTableRows(modal,10000);await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,3000)});var backlinks=findMetricValue(modal,'Backlinks');var referringDomains=findMetricValue(modal,'Referring domains');var backlinksList=extractBacklinksTable(modal);console.log('[Ahrefs Backlinks] Extracted '+backlinksList.length+' backlinks for '+currentDomain);allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,backlinks_count:backlinks,referring_domains_count:referringDomains,backlinks:backlinksList,turnstile_retries:waitResult.attempts});var closeBtn=modal.querySelector('button[class*="closeButton"]')||document.querySelector('button[class*="closeButton"]');if(!closeBtn){var svgClose=modal.querySelector('svg[class*="close"]')||modal.querySelector('[aria-label="Close"]');if(svgClose)closeBtn=svgClose.closest('button')||svgClose;}if(!closeBtn){var allCloseBtns=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('button'));closeBtn=allCloseBtns.find(function(b){return b.getAttribute('aria-label')==='Close'||b.textContent.trim()==='X'||b.textContent.trim()==='x'||b.textContent.trim()==='';});}if(closeBtn)closeBtn.click();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000)});var stillModal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(stillModal){var overlay=document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Overlay"]');if(overlay)overlay.click();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,1000)});}if(i<domainList.length-1){await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000)});}}return JSON.stringify({total_domains:domainList.length,results:allResults});
